title: pelargonium helleri
intro: Pelargonium helleri, also known as Heller's geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds such as geraniol and linalool, known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium helleri include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and the alleviation of respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively harnessed and utilized.
